snippet.title: Number One - Dunsin Oyekan ft @JohnWilds #dunsinoyekan #johnwilds
snippet.description:
Number One Love: First Love; Only Love.

This sound is a sound of commitment, a sound of decision, a love song.

Love is not a one off choice that powers itself at the beginning. It is a daily choice, a decision, a quiet determination to persist in loving the object of your affection whether the feeling is present or not, whether the demand of the sacrifice feels too weighty for the mind to comprehend.

This love is a declaration that every day we do not just choose the Lord, we prioritize Him above all.

Not because we are skilled at choosing Him,
but because our eyes have seen a love too great for words.

His love has constrained our hearts,
and daily we remind our souls to stay,
to stay put in this First Love,
this Only Love,
our Number One Love.

So Abraham rose early in the morning and saddled his donkey, and took two of his young men with him, and Isaac his son; and he split the wood for the burnt offering, and arose and went to the place of which God had told him.” Genesis 22:3 NKJV

Turn my eyes away from vanity [all those worldly, meaningless things that distract—let Your priorities be mine], And restore me [with renewed energy] in Your ways. Psalms 119:37 AMP

snippet.title: DJ Ab - Shiga (Ya bi jiki) {Official Video}
snippet.description:
“Shiga” (which means Enter) started as a raw freestyle I casually dropped on my IG story. The response was instant — people connected with the energy and kept asking me to turn it into a full song. So I did.

In this track, I talk my talk. It’s a lamba about the journey — the struggle, the hunger, and the nights nobody saw before the doors finally opened. “Shiga” is me stepping into my moment, reminding everyone that every success has a story behind it. If you know what it means to suffer before shining, this one is for you.

snippet.title: Focker-In-Law | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
The circle of trust just got bigger. Focker-In-Law is in theaters this Thanksgiving. 
 ______  

This November, comedy icon and Emmy winner Ben Stiller and two-time Oscar® winner Robert De Niro reunite, joined by Grammy winner and Oscar® nominee Ariana Grande, in Focker-In-Law, a new chapter in the blockbuster Meet the Parents franchise.
 
Written and directed by John Hamburg, who co-wrote the three previous Meet the Parents films, Focker-In-Law is produced by Oscar® nominee Jane Rosenthal and Robert De Niro for Tribeca Productions; Ben Stiller and Oscar® winner John Lesher for Red Hour Films; Emmy winner Jay Roach for Delirious Media; and John Hamburg for Particular Pictures.


Find Focker-In-Law on Instagram at https://www.instagram.com/fockerinlaw/
Follow Focker-In-Law on Facebook at  https://www.facebook.com/fockerinlaw/
Follow Focker-In-Law on X at https://twitter.com/fockerinlaw
Follow Focker-In-Law on TikTok at https://www.tiktok.com/@fockerinlaw
https://www.fockerinlaw.com 

Genre: Comedy
Cast: Robert De Niro, Ben Stiller, Ariana Grande, Owen Wilson, Blythe Danner, Teri Polo, Skyler Gisondo, Beanie Feldstein, Eduardo Franco
Written and directed by: John Hamburg
Producers:Jane Rosenthal, Robert De Niro, Ben Stiller, John Lesher, Jay Roach, John Hamburg
